title: Dino's Party!
description: Adds quirky tools, a magic block, and a kinda-working mace—with dinosaurs and new mobs on the way!
body:
🛠 What This Mod Adds

Spice up your gameplay with a mix of quirky tools, mysterious blocks, and chaotic charm:

    🪓 Chisel
    Transform ordinary blocks into stylish chiseled versions!
    (More shapes and features coming soon!)

    🧱 Magic Block
    A block with unpredictable, magical properties.
    Proceed with curiosity—and caution.

    ⚔️ Kinda Working Mace
    A melee weapon that's... in progress.
    It might work. Use at your own risk!

    🧵 Copper Wire
    Craft cool PCBs and flex your tech-savvy skills.

    💻 PCB
    A tiny, adorable printed circuit board.
    Not very useful yet—but it looks neat!

🦖 Coming Soon

The madness has just begun. Here's what’s in the works:

    🐉 A Dinosaur
    Big, loud, and (hopefully) friendly.

    👾 New Mobs
    Expect strange and silly creatures to wander your world.

🧪 Notes

This mod is still in early development.
Some features are experimental, others might be a bit broken.
Got ideas? Bugs? Weird encounters? We’d love your feedback!
